meta.title: Terms and Conditions | [company_name]
meta.description: Read the terms and conditions for [company_name] services in [city_name], [state_name].

body:
## Terms and Conditions

Welcome to [company_name]. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

## Use of Services

[company_name] provides professional fireplace services to residential and commercial customers in [city_name], [state_name]. All services are subject to availability and our standard service agreement. You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes.

## Limitation of Liability

[company_name] shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

## Contact

For questions about these terms, please contact us at [phone] or visit [domain].
